Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Ruth White'S Discovery Responses; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Their Attorney Of Record; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1-DEFENDANT ROBERT VILLA's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Ruth White'S Discovery Responses; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Their Attorney Of Record.

No opposition filed; motion granted. Sanctions of $950 awarded to Defendants. Responses to be served by November 20, 2023. Prevailing party to prepare a proposed form of order in word format to the Court at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/jpt)
